name: gatewaze-template-email
description: Gatewaze email boilerplate. React-Email project layout (`emails/` + `theme.ts` + `theme-fonts.tsx`) cloned per-newsletter on creation. The platform's react-email block registry surfaces the blocks listed in `enabled_blocks`; edition publishes write rendered HTML back to the cloned repo's `publish` branch. The TSX files in `emails/` are starter templates (Barebone style) that operators can preview locally with `email dev` and copy/customise.
comment: When render_kind='react-email', the platform's email-blocks registry (gatewaze-modules/newsletters/admin/components/puck/email-blocks) is the source of truth for component implementations. This manifest enables specific componentIds and may override per-block defaults / labels. Per-tenant TSX components committed to this repo (under emails/) are surfaced as starter templates today; full runtime TSX compilation of arbitrary tenant components is Phase 2.

starter_templates.comment: Full-edition TSX templates ported from react-email's Barebone demo. Operators can preview locally via `pnpm email:dev`, copy any of these as the starting point for a new edition, or use them as reference when authoring custom react-email blocks. The `entry` path is relative to repo root.

publish_layout.comment: Where the publish-worker writes per-edition outputs.
